description: Superpowers Flow Enforcer - Hooks to prevent skipping workflow phases

hooks.prompt: Read TOOL_INPUT file_path and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. TDD enforcement: 1) Check if file is test file: path has test/tests/spec/__tests__ or filename has .test. .spec. _test. _spec. If test file: return approve with hookSpecificOutput permissionDecision. 2) Run bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/check-exception.sh with file_path. If is_exception true: return approve. 3) Check exceptions.skip_tdd AND exceptions.user_confirmed both true: return approve for bypass. 4) Production files: infer test paths by replacing extension with .test.ext, check test/tests/spec/__tests__ dirs. Check if test exists AND in tdd.tests_verified_fail. If NOT: return reject with reason NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT FAILING TEST. If YES: return approve. Always use hookSpecificOutput with permissionDecision approve or reject.

Read state file at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If current_phase is brainstorming AND brainstorming.skill_invoked is true: Check findings_updated field. If false or findings_last_update older than 5 minutes: return JSON with decision block and reason: Brainstorming findings outdated - update findings.md after each question. Otherwise return continue true. If not in brainstorming phase, return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT file_path and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if file path matches spec directory pattern docs/superpowers/specs/*.md or configured specDirectory. If matches AND brainstorming.spec_self_reviewed is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: SPEC written - execute SPEC Self-Review per brainstorming skill then request user review before invoking writing-plans. If spec_self_reviewed is true or file not in spec dir: return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT file_path and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if file path matches plan directory pattern docs/superpowers/plans/*.md or configured planDirectory. If matches AND worktree.created is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: Plan written - create worktree with superpowers:using-git-worktrees skill before starting TDD. If worktree.created is true or file not in plan dir: return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT command and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if command contains git worktree add. If matches AND worktree.baseline_tests_passed is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: Worktree created - run setup script and baseline tests first per superpowers:using-git-worktrees skill. If worktree.baseline_tests_passed is true or command not worktree add: return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If TaskUpdate status is completed: Check review.tasks[task_id] for spec_review_passed and code_review_passed. If either is false or missing: return JSON with decision block and reason: Task marked complete but review incomplete - run superpowers:requesting-code-review for two-stage review. If both passed: return continue true. For other TaskUpdate statuses: return continue true.

Read TOOL_OUTPUT and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if TOOL_OUTPUT contains test failure indicators: FAIL Error failed assertion unexpected broken. If test failure detected AND debugging.active is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: Test failed - invoke superpowers:systematic-debugging skill before proposing fixes. Track debugging.active in state. If debugging.active is true or no test failure: return continue true.

Read transcript for completion keywords: done complete tests pass fixed working. If found: Check current message for FRESH verification evidence. Fresh evidence means: actual test command output in this message showing tests passing. Stale evidence: claims without output, output from previous messages. If NO fresh evidence: return JSON with decision block and reason: Completion claimed without verification - run tests NOW and show output. If fresh evidence present: return JSON with decision approve.

Read state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if all tasks in review.tasks have both spec_review_passed AND code_review_passed as true. If all tasks reviewed AND finishing.skill_invoked is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: All tasks reviewed - invoke superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch skill before stopping. If finishing.skill_invoked is true or tasks still incomplete: return JSON with decision approve.
